class.name: GDREConfig
class.brief_description: Persistent and ephemeral configuration store for GDRE Tools.
class.description: [GDREConfig] is the engine singleton that holds GDRE Tools' user configuration. It exposes a typed list of default settings (returned by [method get_all_settings]) and supports two storage layers: - [b]Persistent[/b] settings are written to disk via [method save_config] and reloaded on startup. - [b]Ephemeral[/b] settings live only for the current session; CLI flags like [code]--set[/code] populate this layer and it is wiped by [method reset_ephemeral_settings]. Retrieve the singleton with [code]Engine.get_singleton("GDREConfig")[/code].

method.name: get_all_settings
method.description: Returns the full list of registered default settings as [GDREConfigSetting] objects, including names, default values, and descriptions.

method.name: get_default_value
method.description: Returns the default value registered for [param setting], ignoring any persisted or ephemeral override.

method.name: get_setting
method.description: Returns the current value of [param setting], preferring an ephemeral override over a persisted value over the registered default. Returns [param default_value] if the setting is not registered.

method.name: has_setting
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param setting] is registered as a known default.

method.name: load_config
method.description: Re-reads the on-disk persistent configuration file, discarding any unsaved changes to persistent settings. Ephemeral settings are unaffected.

method.name: reset_ephemeral_settings
method.description: Clears all ephemeral settings, so subsequent reads fall back to the persistent value (or default).

method.name: save_config
method.description: Writes the current persistent configuration to disk.

method.name: set_setting
method.description: Sets [param setting] to [param value]. By default the change is recorded to the appropriate layer based on the setting's ephemeral flag; pass [param force_ephemeral] = [code]true[/code] to store the override only in the ephemeral layer, leaving the persisted value intact.
